tools.name: scope_check
tools.description: Determine whether NIS2 (and its national transposition) applies to an organization, and whether it is an essential or important entity. Inputs: EU/EEA country (ISO-2), primary NIS2 sector, headcount, turnover/balance sheet in M EUR, special categories (DNS, TLD, cloud, qualified trust services). Ret

tools.name: transposition_status
tools.description: Current NIS2 transposition status per EU/EEA country (law, stage, competent authority, sources), from the Reglyze transposition tracker (curated + weekly auto-updated). Omit the country for the full map.

tools.name: incident_deadline_formats
tools.description: NIS2 incident-notification deadlines for a country: the 24h/72h/1-month stages with their national legal basis, the competent authority/CSIRT and portal, and the national severity vocabulary (e.g. Italy's ACN IS-1..IS-4 typologies, with their entity-class applicability).

tools.name: compliance_status
tools.description: Requires a Reglyze API token. Returns YOUR organization's current compliance score, implementation/documentation sub-scores, open-task counts, and the national-framework per-objective view.

tools.name: documents_list
tools.description: Requires a Reglyze API token. Lists YOUR organization's compliance documents (title, type, status, current version). Metadata only, not document content.

tools.name: open_tasks
tools.description: Requires a Reglyze API token. Lists YOUR organization's open remediation tasks. Optional filters: status, severity, overdue.

tools.name: incidents_list
tools.description: Requires a Reglyze API token. Lists YOUR organization's recorded incidents (title, status, severity, detection date).
